name: Kingdom of Dinza
short_description: An indie top-down 2D, procedurally generated, open world fantasy old school RPG. Explore wild areas, forests and dungeons, fight monsters and craft superior weapons and armor as you uncover the mysteries and overcome the challenges of the Kingdom of Dinza!
detailed_description:
A naive indie, old school and beautiful 2D game with a procedurally generated open world of exploration and mystery awaits you in the Kingdom of Dinza!

Tasked with finding a long lost weapon of myth, you are sent to the long forgotten kingdom of Dinza in a desperate attempt to save your own home.

Rescue the kidnapped members of a failed expedition and uncover the secrets of a lost kingdom.

With fantasy RPG elements, various crafting mechanics, monster fighting and solving dungeon based challenges - Kingdom of Dinza is a game to experience.

Complete your main quest (with a time limit on harder difficulties) and achieve greatness, fail - and you can start again in a brand new land!

Key game features:

  • Randomization ensures a different experience every time you create a new game - procedural generation includes the open world, dungeons, monsters and loot.
  • 3 game modes - from easy, for a more relaxed, exploration oriented gameplay, to hard - for intense timed experience.
  • No map, no flashing indicators and very little hand holding - the world is truly yours to learn and enjoy! Draw your own map of land, important locations and dungeons, or simply go wherever your journey will take you.
  • Manage your gear, items and stats to become more powerful as the adventure progresses.
